ieces of code that are related to specific modules get their own files (module.c/h). Because of this, we digress from Google's function naming convention and add the module name in lowercase at the front of each of the functions within these modules.

ont of each of the functions within these modules. For example: '''moduleRegularFunction(...)''' Other than this addition at the front, we'll follow [[http://google-styleguide.googlecode.com/svn/trunk/cppguide.xml#Function_Names|Google's way of namin
